description_long: This object is a rectangular, hardbound book with a deep red or burgundy cover that appears slightly worn, especially on the back where some of the surface is abraded. The front cover features a dark, possibly embossed or inset rectangular area, which may have once displayed an illustration or label, but its details are indistinct. The spine is accented by a thin gold vertical line running its length, giving it a classic, somewhat vintage appearance. The book's edges are slightly rounded, and the cover material has a matte, textured finish. There are no visible dust jacket flaps, and the book's overall structure suggests it is a sturdy, traditional hardcover. The back cover has a patch of missing color, revealing a lighter underlayer.
description: A vintage, hardbound book with a deep red cover, gold-accented spine, and a dark rectangular area on the front. The cover shows signs of wear, especially on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep red cover with a dark, rectangular inset or label in the center.
description_view_1: Spine view reveals a gold vertical line running down the center, with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: Back view displays a worn area with missing color, exposing a lighter patch beneath the red surface.
description_view_3: Opposite spine view, similar to view 1, with the gold line visible and no additional features.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is deep red with a single thin gold vertical line running down its length. No text or decorative elements are visible.
